worktree /home/user/repo
HEAD abc1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef123456
branch refs/heads/main

worktree /home/user/worktrees/feature-branch
HEAD def4567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678
branch refs/heads/feature-branch

worktree /home/user/worktrees/detached-head
HEAD 9876543210abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678
detached

worktree /home/user/worktrees/locked-worktree
HEAD fedcba0987654321abcdef1234567890abcdef12
branch refs/heads/locked-branch
locked reason: manually locked

worktree /home/user/worktrees/prunable-worktree
HEAD 1111111111111111111111111111111111111111
branch refs/heads/old-branch
prunable gitdir file points to non-existent location
